text.title: AI-Generated IaC Review Red-Flags Core Rules
text.summary: 8 testable rules with rationale + source for ai-generated-iac-review-redflags. Includes terminal skip-this-methodology rule.

rule.statement: No resource block may contain literal access keys, secret keys, passwords, or bearer tokens; secrets MUST come from a vault data source (`vault_generic_secret`, `aws_secretsmanager_secret_version`).
rule.rationale: AWS Well-Architected SEC03 + GitGuardian 2024 — hardcoded creds in IaC are the most common breach vector.

rule.statement: Security groups / NSGs / firewall rules MUST NOT contain `0.0.0.0/0` or `::/0` on ports other than 80/443. Wider opens require an explicit `allow-public-ingress = true` tag with justification.
rule.rationale: CIS AWS Foundations 5.2 + Azure Security Baseline NS-1.

rule.statement: S3 / GCS / Azure Blob buckets MUST set `public_access_block` (or equivalent) to deny all public access unless explicitly tagged `public-website = true`.
rule.rationale: AWS S3 Block Public Access default-on policy (2023) + CIS AWS 2.1.5.

rule.statement: Terraform / OpenTofu backends MUST configure state locking (DynamoDB for S3, GCS native, Azure Blob native). Pulumi must use a backend with locking.
rule.rationale: Terraform docs — concurrent apply without lock is the textbook way to corrupt state.

rule.statement: Every taggable resource MUST carry `owner`, `cost-center`, `env`, `data-classification` tags as defined in the tag policy.
rule.rationale: FinOps Foundation — untagged resources cannot be charged back and become orphans.

rule.statement: IAM policies MUST NOT combine `Action: *` with `Resource: *`. Wildcards are allowed on one axis only with explicit justification comment.
rule.rationale: AWS IAM least-privilege guidance + Cloudsplaining defaults.

rule.statement: Storage resources (RDS, EBS, S3, GCS, Azure SQL) MUST set `encrypted = true` / equivalent; KMS key MUST be customer-managed for `data-classification = pii|phi|pci`.
If the change has no `plan` diff or targets a personal sandbox, the methodology returns `skipped`.
